title: RAULOPOLY
subtitle: THE GALACTIC CHAOS MONOPOLY
tutorialDesc: Your goal is to become the richest player while navigating a chaotic galactic board. Buy properties, collect rent, and survive the chaos!
rulesText: The board has 40 squares: properties, stations, utilities, taxes, and chaos/power cards.
If you land on an unowned property you can buy it; otherwise you pay rent.
Rent doubles when the owner has the full color monopoly.
Reaching $0 turns you into a ghost: you can't buy but can still collect from others.
CHAOS and POWER cards trigger special effects (check the game screen for details).
The chaos die (30% chance) can activate a third special die.
The last player with money remaining wins the game.

features.title: 🔀 Teleporters
features.desc: The board moves you where you don't want

features.title: 🦹 Quantum Theft
features.desc: You can steal money and properties from others

go.name: GO
go.desc: Collect $200 when you pass. The start of your galactic journey.

property.name: PROPERTY
property.desc: Buy to corner a color or pay rent. With monopoly, rent doubles.

railroad.name: STATION
railroad.desc: Space transport. Rent doubles with each extra station.

utility.name: UTILITY
utility.desc: Cosmic resources. Rent = (dice × 4) or (dice × 10) if you own both.

tax.name: TAX
tax.desc: You pay the bank. Your money goes to the Galactic Jackpot.

jail.name: JAIL/VISIT
jail.desc: Mandatory 3-turn stay. Or pay $50 to leave, or roll doubles.

freeparking.name: JACKPOT
freeparking.desc: Fortune! Collect ALL accumulated wealth from taxes and chaos squares.

chance.name: POWER OF CHAOS
chance.desc: Random beneficial effect: movement, money, or magical cards.

chest.name: CHAOS BOX
chest.desc: Extreme random effect: can bankrupt or save you. Chaos reigns!

gotojail.name: TELEPORTER
gotojail.desc: Sends you straight to JAIL without collecting $200.

events.gameStarted: RAULOPOLY HAS STARTED! 🚀 Let chaos be with you!
events.bankruptGhost: 💀 {{player}} is BANKRUPT and becomes a VENGEFUL GHOST! 👻
events.teleportToJail: 🌀 TELEPORT TO JAIL! {{player}} vanishes from existence for a moment...
events.payTaxToJackpot: 💸 {{player}} pays ${{amount}} in taxes to the Galactic Jackpot.
events.ownProperty: 🏠 {{player}} landed on their own property. At least someone visited!
events.shieldUsed: 🛡️ {{player}} uses their DIMENSIONAL SHIELD! Rent avoided.
events.chaosDieGain100: 🎁 Chaos Die [2]! {{player}} receives ${{amount}} from the galactic bank.
events.chaosDieShield: 😇 Chaos Die [5]! {{player}} is IMMUNE to next rent.
events.chaosDieStorm: 🌪️ Chaos Die [6]! TOTAL STORM! Everyone loses ${{amount}}.
events.cardNextBackward: 🔄 {{player}} will get the CURSED DIE next turn.
events.cardPay200: 💸 {{player}} pays ${{amount}} to the bank for "fiscal quake".
events.cardOutOfJail: 🗝️ {{player}} gets a "Get Out of Jail Free" card.
events.chaosCardAllLoseHalf: 🌪️ GALACTIC STORM! Everyone loses half their money.
events.chaosCardDestroyHouses: ☄️ METEORITE! All houses in group {{group}} are DESTROYED.
events.chaosCardDoubleRent: 🔥 REVOLUTION! All rents are DOUBLED for {{turns}} turns.
events.chaosCardNextDiceX3: 🧬 {{player}} activated GENETIC MUTATION. Next dice x3!
events.chaosCardCollect100Each: ✨ {{player}} collects ${{amount}} from each player via galactic charisma.
events.chaosCardNextTurnFree: 🛡️ {{player}} activates DIMENSIONAL SHIELD. Next rent: free.
events.chaosCardBackToStart: 👻 {{player}} goes back to start via time loop. No $200 collected.
events.skipBuy: 😒 {{player}} skips buying. A lost galactic opportunity.
events.ghostHaunt: 👻 {{ghost}} HAUNTS {{target}}! They lose extra ${{amount}} next turn.
events.jailShieldNoUse: (You have a jail shield, it doesn't apply here 😅)
events.ghostStealPrompt: Choose which player to STEAL a property from:

nextBackward.title: POWER OF CHAOS
nextBackward.text: CURSED DIE! Your next move is in REVERSE.

goToJail.title: POWER OF CHAOS
goToJail.text: Go directly to JAIL. Do not collect $200.

pay200.title: POWER OF CHAOS
pay200.text: FISCAL QUAKE! Pay $200 to the bank.

outOfJail.title: POWER OF CHAOS
outOfJail.text: Get out of jail for free. (Keep this card.)

nearest.title: POWER OF CHAOS
nearest.text: Move to the nearest UNOWNED property.

allLoseHalf.title: GALACTIC STORM!
allLoseHalf.text: ALL players lose HALF of their money. Not even the bank is safe.

swapWithRichest.title: QUANTUM INVERSION!
swapWithRichest.text: Swap BOARD POSITION with the richest player.

destroyHouses.title: METEOR STRIKE!
destroyHouses.text: A meteor destroys ALL houses in a random color group.

leftLose300.title: VIRAL CURSE!
leftLose300.text: The player to your LEFT loses $300 due to "karmic contamination".

goMostExpensive.title: BLACK HOLE!
goMostExpensive.text: You are pulled to the MOST EXPENSIVE PROPERTY on the board.

doubleRent.title: PROLETARIAN REVOLUTION!
doubleRent.text: ALL rents DOUBLE for the next 2 turns.

nextDiceX3.title: GENETIC MUTATION!
nextDiceX3.text: Your NEXT die is multiplied by 3.

randomTeleport.title: FORCED TELEPORT!
randomTeleport.text: You are sent to a COMPLETELY RANDOM square.

collect100each.title: GALACTIC CHARISMA!
collect100each.text: Collect $100 from EACH player thanks to your magnetic aura.

payPerProp.title: KARMIC TAX!
payPerProp.text: Pay $50 for EACH PROPERTY you own.

nextTurnFree.title: DIMENSIONAL SHIELD!
nextTurnFree.text: You are IMMUNE to rents on your next turn.

bankCharge400.title: ECONOMIC CRISIS!
bankCharge400.text: The bank charges you $400 in "dimensional bailout fees".

backToStart.title: TIME LOOP!
backToStart.text: Go back to START without collecting $200.

ghostSteal.title: SPIRIT POSSESSION!
ghostSteal.text: Steal ONE random property from any player.
